title: Create: Cobblemon | Season 1
description: Create: Cobblemon focuses around decoration, automation, and Cobblemon, with over 300 quests to take you through a scenic world on an epic adventure!
body:
![C:C S1 Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PanPanda1/ModdingAssets/refs/heads/main/CC%20S1/WIDE1920.png)

### Welcome to the first season of Create: Cobblemon! This pack features 190 Mods, focused around decoration, automation, and Cobblemon! Featuring 14 Cobblemon addons such as Mega Showdown and Cobblemon Cafe, you really will want to Catch Them All!

![Cobblemon Additions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PanPanda1/ModdingAssets/refs/heads/main/CC%20S1/456.png)

### The Create mod makes up the 2nd pillar of this pack, with many addons including Sifting, Enchantment Industry, Garnished, and Copycats+ to name a few!

![Create Mod Additions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PanPanda1/ModdingAssets/refs/heads/main/CC%20S1/2026-03-04_01.30.56.png)

### This pack also includes many overhaul and redesign mods, like the Creeper & Enderman Overhaul mods, Deeper and Darker, Incendium, and many of the Yung's Better series.

![Mob & Biome Additions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PanPanda1/ModdingAssets/refs/heads/main/CC%20S1/132.png)

### As for Utility, there's no shortage there either, with additions like Waystones, Traveller's Backpack, Xaero's Minimap, Sophisticated Storage, Botany Pots, and Tom's Simple Storage, and on top of that, you can also decorate your houses and factories alike with mods like Handcrafted, Another Furnature, Item Display, Ammendments, and Supplementaries.

![Utility Additions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PanPanda1/ModdingAssets/refs/heads/main/CC%20S1/2026-03-04_01.47.24.png)

## Quest Info:
// *THE BELOW IS NOT REQUIRED FOR V1.0.2 OR LATER*
Unfortunately, FTB mods are not able to be put in Modrinth Modpacks, and there's no alternative for NeoForge 1.21.1. after downloading the pack, please find and download:
- FTB Library NeoForge 2101.1.26
- FTB Xmod Compat Neoforge 21.1.6
- FTB Filter System NeoForge 21.1.3
- FTB Teams NeoForge 2101.1.7
- FTB Quests NeoForge 2101.1.18
